title: Project 1: Customer Churn — Problem Statement and Dataset
content:
### Day 216: Project 1: Customer Churn — Problem Statement and Dataset

**Customer Churn Prediction — Problem Statement**

**Business Context:** Telecom companies lose $75B/year to churn. Predict which customers will leave.

**Setup:**
1. Download/create dataset
2. Understand features and target variable
3. Set evaluation metric
codeExample:
# Day 216: Project 1: Customer Churn — Problem Statement and Dataset
# Customer Churn Prediction — Setup
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Create sample dataset
np.random.seed(42)
n = 1000
df = pd.DataFrame({
    'customer_id': range(n),
    'tenure': np.random.randint(1, 72, n),
    'monthly_charges': np.random.uniform(20, 120, n).round(2),
    'total_charges': np.random.uniform(100, 8000, n).round(2),
    'contract': np.random.choice(['Month-to-month', 'One year', 'Two year'], n),
    'churn': np.random.choice([0, 1], n, p=[0.73, 0.27])
})

print(f"Dataset shape: {df.shape}")
print(f"Churn rate: {df['churn'].mean():.1%}")
print(f"\nColumns: {list(df.columns)}")
print(f"\n{df.head()}")
practiceQuestions: What business problem does this solve?
keyTakeaways:
Customer Churn Prediction — Problem Statement

Business Context: Telecom companies lose $75B/year to churn.
